name: Community Bank & Trust, Waco, Texas
description_short: Community Bank & Trust is a family-owned bank in Waco, Texas offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and wealth management services with FDIC insurance.
description_long:
Community Bank & Trust (CB&T) is a family-owned and family-oriented bank headquartered in Waco, Texas. According to customer testimonials on their website, the institution has served the community for over four decades, positioning itself as a relationship-driven alternative to larger national banks. The bank emphasizes personal attention and community commitment as core differentiators.

CB&T offers a comprehensive suite of personal and business banking products including personal checking and savings accounts, CDs with competitive rates (3.92% APY for 12 months and 4.50% APY IRAs for five years mentioned as current offerings), personal and auto loans, home loans, business loans, and mobile banking services. The bank provides online account opening, mobile deposit, bill pay, debit card controls through Card Suite Lite, and a trust department for wealth management and financial planning. All deposits are FDIC-insured and backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government.

CB&T distinguishes itself through emphasis on personalized service, community involvement, and local decision-making. Customer reviews highlight friendly staff, knowledgeable loan officers, and undivided attention from tellers and trust officers. The bank actively sponsors local initiatives including Leadership Waco, Waco ISD grants, and Banking VIBE workshops with the Cen-Tex African American Chamber of Commerce. Recent accolades mentioned on their site include recognition as "Most Loved" in banking and mortgages, and #1 for customer service.

As a regional bank, CB&T serves customers seeking personalized banking relationships with local community roots rather than digital-first or ultra-low-fee options. The website demonstrates solid digital capabilities (online account opening, mobile banking platform updates) but positions itself primarily on service quality and community ties. Customers should expect relationship-based banking with rates and fees competitive within their market, though specific fee schedules and full product details are not detailed on the public-facing website. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal checking accounts with Debit Mastercard and contactless payment options
Personal savings accounts and CDs with variable promotional rates
Mobile banking with mobile deposit, bill pay, and Card Suite Lite debit card controls
Online account opening and enrollment in online banking
Personal auto loans and personal loans
Home mortgage loans with online application
Business loans and business banking services
Trust Department services for estate planning and financial legacy preservation
Wealth Management and financial planning advisory
Lost/stolen debit card reporting and fraud controls
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by the U.S. Government
Competitive CD rates advertised (3.92% APY for 12 months) and IRA rates (4.50% APY for five years)
Family-owned bank with 40+ years of local Waco market presence
Comprehensive digital banking including mobile deposit, bill pay, and online account opening
Dedicated Trust Department and Wealth Management services for estate planning
Mobile banking platform with debit card controls (Card Suite Lite) to prevent fraud
Strong community involvement with sponsorships of local education and business programs
cons: Limited geographic footprint as regional bank may restrict branch access for relocating customers
Specific account fees, minimum balances, and product rate details not disclosed on website
No mention of investment products beyond trust services and basic IRA/CD offerings
Mobile banking described as 'coming soon' suggests digital capabilities lag competitor expectations
No transparent comparison of rates or fees relative to national or online banking alternatives
best_for: Waco-area residents seeking personalized relationship banking with local decision-makers
Customers prioritizing wealth management and trust services for estate planning
Business owners and entrepreneurs needing business loans with local bank relationships
Retirees interested in financial planning and IRA/CD products with personal advisory service
diagnosis: Community Bank & Trust is best for Waco-area customers who value personalized service, community involvement, and local banking relationships over digital-first convenience or ultra-competitive rates. The primary caveat is that as a regional bank with limited transparency on pricing, it requires direct inquiry into account fees and rate comparisons rather than easy online comparison to larger national or online banks.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
